# MarkScheme

> Cambridge International A-Level and O-Level past-paper marking with real mark schemes.

MarkScheme lets students upload handwritten answers (photos) or whole papers and receive mark-by-mark feedback: B1/M1/A1 for maths, band descriptors for essays, MCQ keys, and whole-paper summaries.

## Primary pages

- Home: /
- Mark a paper (product): /mark
- Subjects supported: /subjects
- How it works: /how-it-works
- Pricing: /pricing
- FAQ: /faq
- Blog (revision guides): /blog
- Per-subject guides: /blog (filter: cambridge-*-past-papers-guide) — 24 syllabuses including 9709, 9702, 9708, 9700, 4024, 5090, etc.

## Keywords we target

Cambridge past papers, A-Level marking, O-Level marking, mark scheme, self-marking past papers, AI marking A-Level, handwritten answers, 9709 maths, 9702 physics, 9708 economics, whole paper marking, syllabus guides.
